Kredivo Product Training

Kredivo Product Training

Kredivo on Invoice

Kredivo & Billease are now available on Checkout. Merchants can accept payments through installments.

Kredivo on Invoice

Eligibility

Entity Type

Can Apply for Kredivo?

Indonesian Entity (PT/CV/Yayasan)*

✅

Indonesian Entity (Perseroan perorangan/PP)*

✅

Indonesian Individual

❌

Foreign Entity*

✅

Foreign Individual

❌

*) notes: Entities with Sales/AM will only be processed to Kredivo

Industry Restriction

*) notes: there were some exceptions made if sales are really pushing for this. MO will to coordinate with partnership for partnerships to negotiate with partner

Industry

List of Business

Kredivo will block all merchants who sell:

  • All vouchers (voucher will review case by case, voucher hotel is not allowed)

  • Gold bar

  • Precious Metal

  • MLM

  • Top up wallet

  • Pulsa transfer (phone credit transfer) except merchant selling direct to end user not to agent

  • Crypto

  • Merchant using marketplaces (e.g tokopedia, shopee seller, included toko.ly etc)

  • Instagram individual accounts / sellers, except well known brand / verified instagram seller (Kredivo will review case by case)

Merchant Requirements

Below are the requirements that a merchant has to submit, whether it’s upon onboarding. We used to have switcher model for Kredivo, but merchants no longer allow for Switcher (Switcher requirements is in archive)

Onboarding

  1. Guidelines

  2. Kredivo Merchant Onboarding

  3. Kredivo Aggregator

    1. Kredivo Aggregator Form

    2. Kredivo TnC 2021

    3. Lampiran Annex

  4. Website requirements

    1. Website is active (fully running), in some case Kredivo team will request process flow or payment flow when reviewing application

Activation SLA

Tech and Settlement Mode

SLA

Aggregator

Review merchant application = 5 - 7 working days

Credential creation by Kredivo = 14 working days

Internal Testing Xendit = 3 working days

*Switcher is no longer allowed

Onboarding Steps Flow

Category

No

Step

Owner

Channel Activation

1

Merchant apply for Kredivo from merchant’s dashboard

[notification no longer available] This request will notify MO in channel #product-apl

And also will available on Kredivo admin dashboard with status New User Activation

Merchant

MO Processing payment channel application

2

MO will check merchant’s application through Kredivo dashboard

Click edit tab

MO will check merchant’s website, and make sure it’s fulfill Kredivo’s requirement

Website requirement :

  • No marketplace / micro ecommerce / Social Media

  • Provide product & pricing

  • Fully functional website

  • Business not related to restricted industry (based on Kredivo classification)

  • Checkout page, no redirect to Whatsapp url

If MO need more information from merchant, MO will request the requirement through self serve email

Most common request :

  • Payment flow

Merchants have submitted their payment flows through the Kredivo dashboard before. However, some of the information provided is unclear. Therefore, we are requesting additional details. Please kindly double-check.

  • Dummy account / access login

Example request :

MO will continue processing to Kredivo once all the requirements are complete. This process will process through Kredivo admin dashboard, MO click email request tab

This action will send email automatically to Kredivo along with Payment flow

SLA for Kredivo review 7 days

Merchant Ops

Kredivo review application

3

Kredivo will review for each submission, and once approve merchant’s request, they will inform MO to do the next step

During the review process, Kredivo will request further information e.g :

  • Merchant’s PIC detail (Name, email & Ph. number)

  • Other information related to merchant’s product, merchant’s features on website

Example :

MO will follow up to merchant and proceed through self serve email also responded to Kredivo’s email

Kredivo

MO proceed for signing process

4

When Kredivo approves the merchant’s application, go to the merchant's dashboard, update the status on Notes, and proceed with the esign process.

Back to Kredivo dashboard, and download Kredivo Merchant Detail form as follows

Click pdf, we’ll get a pop up window, continue click view

click download

Merchant Ops

E-sign Process

5

Go to https://app.spotdraft.com/home click Send for Signature

Upload Pdf file we download previously on Kredivo dashboard, click next

Fill the Contract Type with Kredivo & Counterparty Name with Merchant legal name, continue click upload button

Place the signature field for signing and click next

Please add MerchatOps and MerchOps MerchOps as Recipients/Viewers so the form can be directed to the #hellosign-alfamart-kredivo channel and Click Save and Close

Once done click Assign Fields

Drag the Signature to sign column on the form and click Review and send

After that click Send for signature

Add notes Waiting Form Signed on Merchant Ops Notes

Spotdraft

Sending Form Kredivo Merchant Detail

6

Once Kredivo merchant detail is signed, MO will get notification on slack in this channel #hellosign-alfamart-kredivo as attached

Download the form and proceed to the next step.

MO will process the form through Kredivo dashboard and send to Kredivo

Go to Kredivo admin dashboard, click on the merchant’s BID

Click pdf, and we’ll get a pop up window to Kredivo Form, continue upload kredivo form on signed field, once the status change to blue color on view tab, this means signed form successfully upload to AD

Next step is go to tab send signed form & logo

We’ll get a pop up window to choose the range date, click confirm and choose merchant that ready to send the form to Kredivo

Checklist merchant with status awaiting_partner_action, and click send email

This action will send email to Kredivo, send the attachment of Kredivo Merchant Detail and logo, also triggering copy of email on merchant’s ops email as attached

Add notes Waiting for Server Key on Merchant Ops Notes

Merchant Ops

Server key Information

7

When all the required forms and logo are received - Kredivo will send us email of merchant’s server key so merchant can start integration, this email contains information :

  1. Merchant name

  2. Server key

Attached is the server key email from Kredivo

Kredivo

Soft Activation

8

Once MO receive server key from Kredivo, MO check merchant’s BID and do soft activation

Click edit and soft activate

We’ll get a pop up message to fill in the detail of server key & settlement days

MO copy-paste the production server key on the server key field

Fill in the production server key from Kredivo, and put settlement days to 4

Ref : settlement

Kredivo dashboard will store credential & server key as attached

This action will also notify merchant through email, and it inform merchant to start testing & integration

Merchant Ops

Testing / Production UAT

9

When merchant starting perform testing & integration, MO need to check this channel #kredivo-live-transaction-testing manually and proceed for sending detail parameter through Kredivo admin dashboard

MO send the parameter on Kredivo dashboard to partner, as informed in Production UAT tab

MO choose which parameter is correct and click view to get detail of parameter

Once Parameter sent to Kredivo, Hard Activate button will available as attached

If all parameter complete, click send parameter, and this action will also notify Kredivo team through email as attached

Kredivo will check the parameter above, and inform MO / PS team whether the parameter is correct, if incorrect MO will ask the merchant to do another testing.

If approved, Kredivo will inform MO as attached email

Merchant, MO, PS & Kredivo

Live Preparation

10

If all parameters are all correct, and Kredivo approved, Kredivo will prepare for Merchant’s activation on their system, and once ready, PIC Kredivo will inform MO or PS through WAG

MO will do hard activation, this step will inform merchant that their Kredivo payment channel is ready to use.

Kredivo

Live Notification

11

MO will push The Hard Activation button and this action will send email to merchant as attached, and Kredivo team will follow up for marketing campaign

Merchant Ops

Server key Information

Kredivo

Share the Server Key

7

MO will create secure notes on last pass and send the server key to PIC Paylater

Merchant Ops

Last Pass

[this step no longer performed]

8

Go to Last pass account https://lastpass.com/

Create Note by click this icon

We’ll get a pop up window to create secure note, choose secure note

Fill in the detail as attached and click save

The secure note will stored in our last pass

Next Step is share the server key to Paylater PIC by clicking the share button

Fill in the detail of recipient email address, and click share

The recipient will get notification through email

Merchant Ops

Soft Activation Request

9

Once MO finish the step above, MO need to request manually to PIC Paylater on channel #p-paylater-issue

Use the workflow and fill in the workflow as requested

Fill in the detail below and click submit

Our request will appear on the channel as attached

Once PIC Paylater respond to our request, MO inform merchant to start the production testing

Merchant Ops

Production UAT

10

MO will send email to merchant with subject email : Integration Kredivo >< Merchant

This email will inform merchant the guideline of Production UAT steps as attached

Merchant Ops

Once merchant complete the Production UAT, merchant need to inform MO by replying the email above and send the detail parameter

Order ID: 627dcb7bd82a61171cab2769

Transaction ID: 459ef36d-9d34-4066-a68e-09fe222ad3ba

Transaction Date:13 May 2022, 10:10 AM

Amount : 750.000

Merchant

MO or PS will passing the parameter above to Kredivo PIC through WAG

Kredivo will check the parameter, if all correct, Kredivo will prepare for the activation, if the parameter still incorrect, MO/PS will ask merchant to do another testing

MO / PS & Kredivo

Live Preparation

11

Once Merchant completed the testing on Production UAT, Kredivo will inform MO / PS once the Kredivo is live

Kredivo

11

MO will follow up Paylater team to do hard activation, and in parallel also inform Channel Activation to change manual status to Live (this action taken if Merchant BID already migrate to AD but still has manual process activation)

Ref : example here

Live Notification

13

MO will send email with subject : Customer Success Kredivo >< Merchant as attached,

The email above is to notify merchant that their Kredivo payment channel is ready to use and this email also as intro for Kredivo PIC (marketing) to follow up on Promo or Kredivo campaign

Merchant Ops
